name: What results should I expect from AI visibility optimization?

mainEntity.name: What results should I expect from AI visibility optimization?

acceptedAnswer.text: The outcome most businesses want is more accurate brand mentions in AI answers, better inclusion in comparison prompts, and stronger visibility for high-intent questions. It can also support organic discovery if the same pages are optimized for both traditional search and AI systems.
acceptedAnswer.description: Expect better brand mentions, more accurate summaries, and improved visibility for important questions.

description: Expect better brand mentions, more accurate summaries, and improved visibility for important questions.
